result.summary: The page has one clear content bug (a misspelled navigation label), plus several layout concerns: game card rows are clipped at the right edge of the viewport without a visible scroll affordance, and the bottom row of games is partially obscured by the fixed bottom navigation bar.

issues.description: The navigation tab is labeled 'Jacpots' instead of 'Jackpots' — a visible spelling error in a primary navigation element.

Game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off at the right edge of the screen (e.g., 'Magni... Pho...', 'Mun... Mi...') with no visible scroll indicator or pagination affordance, making it unclear whether more content is reachable.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible horizontal scroll indicator, partial-peek styling with a fade/gradient edge, or arrow controls to signal that the carousel scrolls horizontally.

issues.description: The last item in the top category navigation is truncated ('Hot Gam...' instead of 'Hot Games') with no clear indication that the row scrolls.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade or chevron at the edge of the category bar to indicate horizontal scrollability, or reduce padding so labels fit.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles (e.g., 'Who Wants to Be a Millionaire') is partially hidden behind the fixed bottom navigation bar, cutting off the game artwork and any info/jackpot labels.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable content area equal to the height of the fixed bottom nav so content isn't obscured at rest.

issues.description: Jackpot amounts overlaid on game tiles (e.g., '$6,259.12', '$13,013.88') sit directly on busy artwork with only partial dark backing, risking poor readability/contrast.
issues.suggestion: Ensure jackpot/info overlays use a consistent semi-opaque dark background strip meeting WCAG contrast requirements.
